Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant SB Decking, Inc.'s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted. No opposition filed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)

Joinder To Sb Decking, Inc.S Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To C.C.P. Sections 583.410, 583.420
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Company's joinder to SB Decking, Inc.'s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sharone L. Clisham, Esq. of WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & McCALL (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / moving party QUINTEC INDUSTRIES, INC.

RULING:
Defendant Quintec Industries's motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution. No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is granted. No opposition filed. The complaint was filed in 1997, over 5 years ago. A hearing is required unless defendant's counsel advises the plaintiff of the tentative ruling and the plaintiff states that he does not wish to contest the tentative ruling. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
